footer.v: 1 - Từ 3 tháng trở lên, 0 - Nhỏ hơn 3 tháng
footer.e: 1 - At least three months, 0 - Less than three months

footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: &CommandWhenVoucherBeforeEdit; declare @unitName nvarchar(1023) select @unitName = case when @@language = 'V' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit select 'this._unit=''' + @@unit + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';load$FormPersonal(this);' as message return
select b.ten_bp%l, convert(varchar(19), a.datetime2, 121) as cookie from phns a left join txdmbp b on a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp where a.ma_ns = @ma_ns return

&CheckTaxCodeDeclare; declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã nhân viên %s đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong danh mục nhân viên.' else N'The Employee ID %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Nhân viên %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The employee %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end
insert into ctns1 select * from @d1 insert into ctns2 select * from @d2 insert into ctns3 select * from @d3 insert into ctns4 select * from @d4

&CommandCheckTaxCodeBeforeSave;
if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_ns = $ma_ns.OldValue) begin select 'ma_ns' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_ns.OldValue)) as message return end
if @ma_ns <> $ma_ns.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where ma_ns = @ma_ns and ma_ns <> $ma_ns.OldValue) begin select 'ma_ns' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_ns)) as message return end
if exists(select * from @@table where ma_ns <> $ma_ns.OldValue and ((ma_ns like rtrim(@ma_ns) + '%') or (@ma_ns like rtrim(ma_ns) + '%'))) begin select 'ma_ns' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_ns)) as message return end end
#IF $d1.NewValue <> $d1.OldValue #THEN update @d1 set ma_ns = @ma_ns, luong_cb = luong_cb_nt, gt_bhnn = gt_bhnn_nt, gt_khac = gt_khac_nt delete ctns1 where ma_ns = $ma_ns.OldValue #END #IF $d2.NewValue <> $d2.OldValue #THEN update @d2 set ma_ns = @ma_ns delete ctns2 where ma_ns = $ma_ns.OldValue #END #IF $d3.NewValue <> $d3.OldValue #THEN update @d3 set ma_ns = @ma_ns delete ctns3 where ma_ns = $ma_ns.OldValue #END #IF $d4.NewValue <> $d4.OldValue #THEN update @d4 set ma_ns = @ma_ns delete ctns4 where ma_ns = $ma_ns.OldValue #END

update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_ns = @ma_ns #IF $d1.NewValue <> $d1.OldValue #THEN insert into ctns1 select * from @d1 #END #IF $d2.NewValue <> $d2.OldValue #THEN insert into ctns2 select * from @d2 #END #IF $d3.NewValue <> $d3.OldValue #THEN insert into ctns3 select * from @d3 #END #IF $d4.NewValue <> $d4.OldValue #THEN insert into ctns4 select * from @d4 #END
&CommandListCheckTaxCodeWarning;

&CommandWhenVoucherBeforeDelete;
delete ctns1 where ma_ns = @ma_ns delete ctns2 where ma_ns = @ma_ns delete ctns3 where ma_ns = @ma_ns delete ctns4 where ma_ns = @ma_ns
